item.title: Practice makes progress🙂‍↕️ In case you’re wondering, 1shortassrider (on Insta not TikTok) is 4’11” (149.86cm) and rides a slightly lowered R1. So if you’re a fellow shorty with the dream of riding a liter, it’s definitely doable😉 #bike #bikelife #bikelov
item.description: Practice makes progress🙂‍↕️ In case you’re wondering, 1shortassrider (on Insta not TikTok) is 4’11” (149.86cm) and rides a slightly lowered R1. So if you’re a fellow shorty with the dream of riding a liter, it’s definitely doable😉 #bike #bikelife #bikelov
